case_title: GONZALES, GERRY B. VS FLORES, OMAR ANTONIO et al

docket_entries.description: UNTIMELY AS TO OMAR FLORES, NOT SERVED 20 DAYS PRIOR HRG. ON SUBSERVICE.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,400.00 FILED BY GONZALES, GERRY B. AS TO DEFENDANT FLORES, OMAR ANTONIO ROCKWOOD, LOUIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-28-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
